title: README top-level Documentation link
goal: Add a short Documentation pointer near the README intro/Quick start that links to docs/README.md, so the full two-variant command reference is discoverable from the top of the README.

steps.title: Add Documentation pointer near intro
steps.detail: One short line linking to docs/README.md placed right after the intro paragraph / at the start of ## Quick start, phrased as the full command reference so it reads as the central index.

steps.title: Keep the Commands-section callout non-duplicate
steps.detail: Reword the existing 📖 callout (README.md:254) and/or the new top pointer so they are not redundant — top = discoverability, Commands = detailed reference.

steps.title: Verify links and headings
steps.detail: Confirm the relative link resolves to docs/README.md and the README heading structure is intact (no broken anchors), via a quick grep.
